caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expressions. In the background, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs, and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands beside a clothing rack filled with various garments. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular logo on the bottom left containing "THE" and another on the bottom right that reads "ROOTS & CULTURE". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, talking into the microphone while the camera maintains a steady medium shot, capturing slight movements in his expression as he speaks.
